name: Indoor Golf Club CA
about: Indoor Golf Club CA is an indoor golf facility providing an accessible and affordable golf experience. The venue offers simulator play on 100+ courses, launch monitor technology, and professional instruction. Founded by golfers of various skill levels, it aims to serve areas with a lack of public golf and practice facilities. Members can enjoy the perks of a country club for a fraction of the price, including equipment discounts and access to advanced technology.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to Trackman technology for precise swing and ball data
Affordable membership pricing compared to traditional country clubs
Variety of 100+ world-class golf courses to play virtually

food_and_drink.notes: No information about food availability provided
No information about alcohol availability provided

simulator_hardware.notes: Trackman is used for swing and ball data analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators and for lessons.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information is provided about bringing outside food or drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified, but the venue offers quick rounds on some of the world's best courses.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically mention being kid-friendly or having junior programs.
